summary: PARTIAL_PASS 4/6. Core save/load mechanics are solid (backup, migration, validation, clamping). Critical bug: _apply_add_anam() bypasses death penalty via direct meta['anam'] credit. anam_accumulated field missing from defaults. biome_run_counts vs biome_runs naming mismatch threatens S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL. fins_vues not in _validate() required_keys.

checks.name: All persistent state saved
checks.details: _get_default_profile() covers: anam, total_runs, fins_vues, faction_rep (5 factions), trust_merlin, talent_tree, oghams (owned+equipped), biome_runs (8 biomes), biomes_unlocked, endings_seen, arc_tags, stats (8 sub-keys), echo_memory, tutorial_flags. Cross-run persistence complete.

checks.name: Save/load round-trip restores exact state
checks.details: save_profile() uses .duplicate(true) for deep copy. load_profile() fills missing keys from defaults, clamps anam and faction_rep. Validation guards against malformed data. Backup (.bak) written before every save. Legacy migration (0.4.0→1.0.0) handles essence→anam, humains→niamh rename, dead currencies removal.

checks.name: Corruption handling: malformed JSON, missing keys, version migration
checks.details: _try_load_file() handles parse errors gracefully. load_profile() tries backup on failure. _validate() checks required keys and faction structure. _migrate() adds missing keys from defaults. All paths return _get_default_profile() on unrecoverable corruption.

checks.name: anam_accumulated field in run state defaults
checks.details: _get_default_run_state() (merlin_save_system.gd:60-95) does NOT include 'anam_accumulated': 0. BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX will write to run['anam_accumulated'] but if a run is resumed from save, this field will be absent until init_run() is called. load_run_state() fills missing keys from _get_default_run_state() defaults — so adding it there fixes resume path.

checks.name: meta['anam'] not credited during run (death penalty integrity)
checks.details: _apply_add_anam() (merlin_effect_engine.gd:440-443) directly credits meta['anam'] = maxi(meta_anam + amount, 0). This bypasses the death penalty ratio min(cards_played/30, 1.0). Director q-20260414-001 mandates ALL in-run Anam is subject to the penalty. Task BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX (P5) addresses this.

checks.name: biome_runs vs biome_run_counts naming consistency
checks.details: save_system._get_default_profile() and apply_run_rewards() both use 'biome_runs' (correct). But S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL task description references meta.biome_run_counts.get(biome_id, 0) — wrong key. Arc condition evaluator must use 'biome_runs' not 'biome_run_counts' or conditions will always return 0.
checks.note: Not a code bug yet (evaluator not implemented) — must be corrected in task description before S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL executes

checks.name: _validate() required_keys includes all current schema fields
checks.details: _validate() required_keys (merlin_save_system.gd:244-248) does NOT include 'fins_vues', 'echo_memory', 'run_history', 'whispers_seen'. These were added to _get_default_profile() but validation doesn't check them. An old save missing fins_vues passes validation then gets default 0 filled — functionally OK but validation is incomplete.

checks.name: init_run() resets anam_accumulated
checks.details: init_run() (store_run.gd:12-51) sets run['anam']=0 but does NOT set run['anam_accumulated']=0. After BUG-ANAM-DEATH-PENALTY-FIX, this counter must be reset at run start to avoid carrying over values from a previous (interrupted) run.

invariants_verified: backup written before every save (save_profile, save_run_state both call _backup_file)

patterns_added.pattern: Fields added to _get_default_profile() must ALSO be added to _validate() required_keys if they are needed for correctness (e.g. fins_vues for arc conditions). Omitting them means validation silently passes old saves — functionally OK due to default-filling but validation is misleading.

Task descriptions that reference field names (e.g. meta.biome_run_counts) must use the CANONICAL name from _get_default_profile() (_biome_runs_). Mismatch discovered between S2-ARC-CONDITION-EVAL description and actual save schema.
